value.rationale: Memories is a durable, cross-session memory feature within OpenAI Codex (the agentic coding product), storing user preferences and project context across sessions. It is a sub-feature of openai-codex that directly maps to the agent-memory capability. As a feature of agentic-coding it covers only a slice of that capability (the memory/persistence aspect), and it is also a genuine instance of the agent-memory capability in its own right.
